sections.paragraph:
δικαιοπραγία, ας, ἡ (Aristot. et al.; schol. on Pla. 107e; PCairMasp 2, 1; 3, 6 [both VI a.d.]; TestDan 1:3;-ξία Just.) righteous action 1 Cl 32:3.—DELG s.v. πράσσω.

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

schol. schol. = scholion, scholia, scholiast

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

PCairMasp PCairMasp = JMaspero, Papyrus grecs d’époque byzantine—List 4

TestDan TestDan = Testament of Dan, s. Test12Patr—List 2

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 246
